  1. de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core
  2. Individual

Verwendungen von Klasse
de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core.Individual

Packages, die Individual verwenden
Package
Beschreibung
de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core
Contains the fundamental, problem-agnostic building blocks of the Darwinian evolutionary engine.
de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core.selection
Contains implementations of the Selection operator for the Darwinian Engine.
de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.problems.cryptanalysis
Implementation of the Cryptanalysis substitution cipher solver.
de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.problems.knapsack
Implementation of the Knapsack optimization problem.
de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.problems.sudoku
Implementation of the Sudoku puzzle problem.
de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.problems.symreg
Implementation of the Symbolic Regression problem.
de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.problems.tsp
Implementation of the Traveling Salesperson Problem (TSP).
de.fhdwhannover.integrea.service
Contains core application services for processing and mutating external data.
de.fhdwhannover.integrea.service.csv
Contains domain-specific CSV parser services.

  • Verwendungen von Individual in de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core

    Methoden in de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core, die Individual zurückgeben
    Modifikator und Typ
    Methode
    Beschreibung
    Individual<T>
    Population.getFittestIndividual()
    Returns the individual with the highest fitness value.
    Individual<T>
    Population.getIndividual(int index)
    Returns the individual at the specified index.
    Methoden in de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core, die Typen mit Argumenten vom Typ Individual zurückgeben
    Modifikator und Typ
    Methode
    Beschreibung
    List<Individual<T>>
    Population.getIndividuals()
    Returns all individuals in this population.
    Methoden in de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core mit Parametern vom Typ Individual
    Modifikator und Typ
    Methode
    Beschreibung
    void
    Population.addIndividual(Individual<T> individual)
    Adds an individual to the population.
    int
    BinaryFitnessFunction.evaluate(Individual<Integer> individual)
     
    int
    FitnessFunction.evaluate(Individual<T> individual)
    Evaluates a candidate individual against problem-specific domain constraints.
    default String
    GAProblem.getPreview(Individual<T> individual)
    Translates a deeply nested chromosome back into a short, human-readable preview string.
    default void
    GAProblem.printSolution(Individual<T> bestIndividual)
    Output hook allowing the problem to dictate how its complex solution structure should be printed or exported at the culmination of the evolutionary loop.
    Konstruktorparameter in de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core mit Typargumenten vom Typ Individual
    Modifikator
    Konstruktor
    Beschreibung
     
    Population(List<Individual<T>> individuals)
    Creates a population containing the given individuals.

    Methoden in de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core.selection, die Individual zurückgeben
    Modifikator und Typ
    Methode
    Beschreibung
    Individual<T>
    LinearRankingSelection.select(Population<T> population)
    Selects an individual using linear ranking probabilities.
    Individual<T>
    RouletteSelection.select(Population<T> population)
    Selects an individual based on fitness proportionate probability.
    Individual<T>
    Selection.select(Population<T> population)
    Executes a specific selection algorithm (e.g., Tournament, Roulette Wheel) to extract a single candidate.
    Individual<T>
    StochasticUniversalSelection.select(Population<T> population)
    Selects a single individual using stochastic universal sampling.
    Individual<T>
    TournamentSelection.select(Population<T> population)
    Selects the fittest individual from a randomly sampled subset of the population.
